title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TVS Supply Chain Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TVS Supply Chain Solutions
jsonLd.description:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About TVS Supply Chain Solutions:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Supply Chain Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
